title: andrographis rotundifolia
intro: Andrographis rotundifolia, also known as the Himalayan or King of Bitters, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Andrographis rotundifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Andrographis rotundifolia include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
